artifact: Counts 2010 races whose circuit country is not in an Asia or Europe country list used by the Formula 1 circuits table.
sql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS race_count FROM races r JOIN circuits c ON r."circuitId" = c.circuitid WHERE r.year = 2010 AND c.country NOT IN ('Bahrain','China','Japan','Korea','Malaysia','Singapore','Turkey','UAE','UK','Spain','Monaco','Belgium','Italy','Germany','Hungary','Europe');

raw_response.sql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS race_count FROM races r JOIN circuits c ON r."circuitId" = c.circuitid WHERE r.year = 2010 AND c.country NOT IN ('Bahrain','China','Japan','Korea','Malaysia','Singapore','Turkey','UAE','UK','Spain','Monaco','Belgium','Italy','Germany','Hungary','Europe');
raw_response.artifact: Counts 2010 races whose circuit country is not in an Asia or Europe country list used by the Formula 1 circuits table.

token_notes: Codex sub-agent token usage is visible to the Codex product, not to this local Node runner.
